title: Aaatha Epita
body:
[Intro/Inter]
---------------------------------
#[C]   |[Bb]  |[F]  |[C]  | 
#[C]   |[Bb]  |[F]  |[C]  | 
#[Bb]  |[-]   |[C]  |[-]  |
#[Bb]  |[-]   |[C]  |[-]  |

#[C]   |[Bb]  |[C]  |[Bb]  |
#[C]   |[Bb]  |[C]  |

[Chorus]
---------------------------------
#[C]    [C7]    [F]
Atha epita hima kanden
#             [C]
Kandu walawa samagin aa
#    [C7]   [F]     
Aadaraye piniketa poda
#[Bb]            [C]        
Sili sili gaa selunaa...
#[Bb]             [C]
Pini keta diluna...
#[Bb]            [C]    
Sili sili gaa selunaa...
#[Bb]             [C]
Pini keta diluna...


[Verse 1]
---------------------------------
#[C]      [C7]    [Bb]
Neguna seethava rali
#[F]             [C]
 Miyuru mihiri gopalu gee //
#[C]             [Bb]
Lihini handin mandharama
#[C]             [Bb]
Lihini handin mandharama
#[F]            [C]
Sili sili ga selunaa..
#[Bb]            [C]
Pini keta dilunaa..


[Verse 2]
---------------------------------
#[C]      [C7]      [Bb]
Layata thurulu paaluven
#[F]           [C]         
 Meedumen vela gosin //
#[C]           [Bb]
Hadehi andi pintharama
#[C]           [Bb]
Hadehi andi pintharama
#[F]          [C]
Bonda vela gosin
#[Bb]         [C]
Bonda vela gosin
